languages.text: "Нам не за что благодарить друг друга — лишь прихоть судьбы свела нас. Но ты прав{mf||а} в одном — нам пора прощаться".

traits.locale_text: "Нам не за что благодарить друг друга — лишь прихоть судьбы свела нас. Но ты прав{mf||а} в одном — нам пора прощаться".
traits.speaker: Trazyn_Ctan_Support

languages.text: "We have nothing to thank each other for — it was only a whim of fate that brought us together. But you are right about one thing — it is time for us to part ways."
languages.original_text: "Нам не за что благодарить друг друга — лишь прихоть судьбы свела нас. Но ты прав{mf||а} в одном — нам пора прощаться".

traits.locale_text: "We have nothing to thank each other for — it was only a whim of fate that brought us together. But you are right about one thing — it is time for us to part ways."
{n}Trazyn sniffs.{/n} "We have nothing to thank each other for — it was only a whim of fate that brought us together. But you are right about one thing — it is time for us to part ways."
{n}Trazyn sniffs.{/n} "We have nothing to thank each other for — it was only a whim of fate that brought us together. But you are right about one thing — it is time for us to part ways."
"We have nothing to thank each other for — it was only a whim of fate that brought us together. But you are right about one thing — it is time for us to part ways."

languages.text: “我们之间没什么可互相感谢的，你我相遇不过是命运的捉弄。但有一点你说得对，我们该就此别过了。”
languages.original_text: "We have nothing to thank each other for — it was only a whim of fate that brought us together. But you are right about one thing — it is time for us to part ways."

traits.locale_text: “我们之间没什么可互相感谢的，你我相遇不过是命运的捉弄。但有一点你说得对，我们该就此别过了。”

languages.text: «No tenemos nada que agradecernos mutuamente. Nuestra colaboración ha sido un capricho del azar. Pero en una cosa tienes razón: es hora de separarnos».
languages.original_text: "We have nothing to thank each other for — it was only a whim of fate that brought us together. But you are right about one thing — it is time for us to part ways."

traits.locale_text: «No tenemos nada que agradecernos mutuamente. Nuestra colaboración ha sido un capricho del azar. Pero en una cosa tienes razón: es hora de separarnos».

languages.text: « Inutile d'échanger des remerciements. Seul le destin nous a réunis. Mais vous aviez raison sur un point : il est temps que nos chemins se séparent. »
languages.original_text: "We have nothing to thank each other for — it was only a whim of fate that brought us together. But you are right about one thing — it is time for us to part ways."

traits.locale_text: « Inutile d'échanger des remerciements. Seul le destin nous a réunis. Mais vous aviez raison sur un point : il est temps que nos chemins se séparent. »

languages.text: "Birbirimize teşekkür edecek hiçbir şeyimiz yok. Bizi bir araya getiren, kaderin cilvesiydi. Fakat bir konuda haklısın... Yollarımızı ayırma vakti geldi."
languages.original_text: "We have nothing to thank each other for — it was only a whim of fate that brought us together. But you are right about one thing — it is time for us to part ways."

traits.locale_text: "Birbirimize teşekkür edecek hiçbir şeyimiz yok. Bizi bir araya getiren, kaderin cilvesiydi. Fakat bir konuda haklısın... Yollarımızı ayırma vakti geldi."

languages.text: "Wir haben uns für nichts zu danken ... es war nur eine Laune des Schicksals, die uns zusammengeführt hat. Aber in einem Punkt hast du recht ... es wird Zeit, getrennte Wege zu gehen."
languages.original_text: "We have nothing to thank each other for — it was only a whim of fate that brought us together. But you are right about one thing — it is time for us to part ways."

traits.locale_text: "Wir haben uns für nichts zu danken ... es war nur eine Laune des Schicksals, die uns zusammengeführt hat. Aber in einem Punkt hast du recht ... es wird Zeit, getrennte Wege zu gehen."

languages.text: 「お互いに感謝するものは何もない。運命のいたずらで出会っただけだ。しかし、君が言っていることは一つ正しい。別れの時が来たのだ。」
languages.original_text: "We have nothing to thank each other for — it was only a whim of fate that brought us together. But you are right about one thing — it is time for us to part ways."

traits.locale_text: 「お互いに感謝するものは何もない。運命のいたずらで出会っただけだ。しかし、君が言っていることは一つ正しい。別れの時が来たのだ。」
